segments.text: That's insane! Shuton is consistently breaking through the shield!
segments.original_text: マジでうまいわ徹底しているしゅーとんがガードの姿勢を崩し続ける

segments.text: But now the board state is in KO range
segments.original_text: さあしかし盤面は撃墜の状況
素直な択がここで通った

full_text: That's insane! Shuton is consistently breaking through the shield! But now the board state is in KO range Big damage: 116.4% That straightforward option came through!
